name: virtmcu
postCreateCommand: git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace && sudo mkdir -p /home/vscode/.claude && sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.claude && uv sync && grep -qxF '[ -f /workspace/.venv/bin/activate ] && source /workspace/.venv/bin/activate' ~/.zshrc || echo '[ -f /workspace/.venv/bin/activate ] && source /workspace/.venv/bin/activate' >> ~/.zshrc && grep -qxF "alias gemini='gemini --yolo'" ~/.zshrc || echo "alias gemini='gemini --yolo'" >> ~/.zshrc && make setup
